title: Hamiltonian stationary Lagrangian surfaces with harmonic mean curvature in complex space forms
summary: In this paper, we deal with Hamiltonian stationary Lagrangian surfaces in complex space forms whose mean curvature is a harmonic function. We prove that if the mean curvature is non-zero constant, then the second fundamental form is parallel. In the non-constant mean curvature case, under the condition of constant Gaussian curvature, we give an explicit description of all such surfaces.
